Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python -c "
import json, random
random.seed\(42\)
lines = open\('data/build123d_ftc/complex_valid.jsonl', encoding='utf-8'\).readlines\(\)
sample = random.sample\(lines, min\(100, len\(lines\)\)\)
with open\('data/build123d_ftc/complex_sample100.jsonl', 'w', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    f.writelines\(sample\)
print\(f'sampled {len\(sample\)} from {len\(lines\)}'\)
" 2>&1)
